summary: Tested Admin panel (P2) and PDF export features. Fixed critical syntax error in Report.js (broken useEffect). All backend admin APIs verified. UI tests: admin panel tabs, user expand, exercises CRUD all working. Non-admin blocked and redirected.

minor.issue: Stats response shows sessions:0 (no user sessions exist in DB yet) - not a bug, just empty data

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: useEffect was broken - handleDownloadPDF was inserted inside useEffect body, causing syntax error. Fixed by restructuring useEffect separately from handleDownloadPDF.

issues: Stats tab Sesiones card renders but 'Sesiones totales' text may have timing issue in tests - visually confirmed working from backend data

action_items: Mobile Admin link in Navbar.js (line 118-124) lacks data-testid='nav-admin-mobile' - minor enhancement
No sessions in DB - PDF export can only be tested after users complete training sessions
Stats tab: 'Sesiones totales' shows 0 because no sessions exist - consider seeding test sessions
critical_code_review_comments: Report.js had CRITICAL syntax error: useEffect was completely broken (missing opening useEffect call + callback structure), the PDF export feature would have caused the entire app to fail to compile. Bug was introduced when handleDownloadPDF was incorrectly placed inside what should have been useEffect. FIXED.
AdminRoute.js renders ShieldAlert + message briefly then Navigate redirect - the navigate and JSX render together is slightly odd but functional

success_rate.backend: 100% (stats, users, exercises CRUD, sessions, 403 block all pass)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (admin panel fully working, Report.js fixed, PDF button present, nav-admin testid confirmed in code)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST Exercise UI during exercises CRUD test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report.js syntax error (broken useEffect) was fixed. Admin panel at /admin with 3 tabs fully working. Exercises CRUD (create/edit/delete) all verified. Non-admin blocked and redirected to /dashboard. nav-admin data-testid confirmed in Navbar.js line 62. PDF button (download-pdf-btn) confirmed in Report.js line 263. No sessions exist in DB so PDF export cannot be E2E tested.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: handleDownloadPDF function was inserted inside what should have been a useEffect callback by E1 agent during P2 implementation. The useEffect call `useEffect(() => {` was missing, leaving orphaned code `api.get(...)` and a dangling `}, [sessionId]);` closure. This caused Babel SyntaxError on `}, [sessionId])` line 210. Fix: Added proper `useEffect(() => {` wrapper and moved handleDownloadPDF to be a standalone function after the useEffect.
